column8: Bob dies
US elects fundamentalist president
US elects atheist president
Fundamentalists stage successful coup
Bob brought online as a replicant
Attack on facility
Bob launches
Bob arrives in Epsilon Eridani
Bob meets, engages, and defeats Brazilian replicant, Medeiros, for the first time
Bob begins making clones
Bill, Riker, Milo, and Mario come online. Bob moves to Heaven 1A ship (v2)
Bob leaves for Delta Eridani, Milo for Omicron2 Eridani, and Mario for Beta Hydri. Bill and Riker work on clones of themselves
Homer (Riker clone) and Garfield (Bill clone) come online, Riker and Homer leave for Sol
Bill and Garfield create Calvin, Goku, and Linus, who then leave Epsilon Eridani in v3 ships
Bill and Garfield perform successful test of SCUT, Garfield uses VR over SCUT surprising Bill
Milo arrives at Omicron2 Eridani A system, discovers Vulcan and Romulus
Milo leaves Omicron2 Eridani (Romulus & Vulcan) for 82 Eridani
Riker and Homer arrive at Sol
Riker and Homer take out remaining Brazilian forces in Sol
Riker receives a transmission from Col. Butterworth of USE, receive colony ship plans and status of Earth & history of war
Riker and Homer work on preparing to build colony ships
Arthur and Charles (Riker clones) are online, Earth population estimated at 15 million
Milo's report on Vulcan and Romulus reaches Bill
Riker hosts first UN sessions
FAITH discovers they have no control over Riker, Butterworth concedes 4 months of first two ships' schedule to shorten 3rd ship schedule by 1 year
VEHEMENT introduced, Bill meets Julia (relative, descendant of sister)
Riker (and all Sol) receive SCUT plans, join Bobnet, learn about Romulous and Vulcan, share the news with Earth

Garfield talks to Bill about their working relationship, they begin fine-tuning VR physics (INCONSISTENCY NOTE: this chapter opens with a mention about the update from Riker & Homer, which is dated May in the previous chapter)

Calvin arrives at Alpha Centauri B, discover remains of USE vessel; Goku arrives at Alpha Centauri A, discovers Brazilian autofactory in full operation, Calvin and Goku proceed to destroy it with one probe escaping
Colony ships halfway done, Sol Bob's discuss plans
Bart (Calvin clone) contacts Bill and joins Bobnet, updates Bill on situation at Alpha Centauri
Bob discovers intelligent life at Delta Eridani (Deltans) and begins cataloging them
Bob clones Marvin, Luke, and Bender
Linus arrives at Epsilon Indi, finds Australian probe Henry Roberts, brings him into VR
Bob witnesses gorilloid attack on Deltans, delivers flint to Archimedes
Deltan Arnold uses axe as weapon for first time in large gorilloid attack
Milo arrives at 82 Eridani and is destroyed, likely by Brazilians
Luke leaves Delta Eridani for Kappa Ceti, Bender for Gamma Leporis A
Bob makes first contact with Archimedes, begins discussions to move Deltan camp to flint site
Arthur destroyed by booby trap near Saturn
Deltan migration begins

Riker intercepts attempted hack from New Zealand, discovers Heaven plans were stolen from Australians; Homer reveals plans for farming space stations (donuts), FAITH agrees to give up some reserve food for space on 3rd ship
Gorilloids attack Deltan migration party
Deltans attacked by leopard-analogue, Diana introduced
Deltans arrive at flint site (former home)
Start of second book, Marvin determines origin area of Deltans
Bill & Garfield’s first comet arrives at Ragnarok, plans begin for non-anchored asteroid movers, Bill works on Bullwinkle
Archimedes learns that Bob builds other Bobs
Homer reveals plans for ranching space station (donut)
Mario arrives in Beta Hydri, discovers full metal and life cleanout and crashed alien ship (first evidence of Others). Mario then leaves for Zeta Tucani.
Marvin discovers that something hunted Deltans to near extinction at their original (source) site
Bob teaches Archimedes jujitsu during mating season. Archimedes hooks up with Diana. Marvin discovers preyed Deltan remains near Camelot.
First 2 colony ships, Exodus-1 and 2, complete
Mulder (Bill Clone) discovers Poseidon in Eta Cassiopeiae, brings Skinner and Johnny online months later
Riker deals with Maldeves' livestock sabotage at Sol; Homer admits he's been underreporting production to establish a surplus
First 2 colony ships loaded and depart for Vulcan, with Howard (Charles clone) as overseer
SCUT (Subspace Communications Universal Transceiver) plans reach Mulder at Eta Cassiopeiae, Mulder joins BobNet
Bob receives SCUT plans and connects to Bobiverse
Marvin & Bob lose a drone to flying predator (first contact with Deltans' original predator)
VEHEMENT introduced (Earth)
Bill hosts first Bobmoot
Bob & Marvin see and engage flying Deltan predator, hippogriffs, after first attack on Deltans, destroy hippogriffs' island with ship buster. Bob kicked out of Delta
Riker deals with another VEHEMENT attack
Bob visits Archimedes, Marvin leaves Delta
Bill receives Milo’s last transmissions concerning 82 Eridani
Bob clones, Pete and Victor, are online and preparing to leave Delan system
Riker and Charles investigate more VEHEMENT attacks
VEHEMENT blows up donut at Earth
Communication to Homer detected
Homer discovered infected by VEHEMENT and cleaned. VEHEMENT tech HQ discovered
Homer suicides
Mario discovers Others' clean out of Zeta Tucani
Riker finds VEHEMENT leader
Luke contacts Bob from Kappa Ceti
Riker takes out VEHEMENT leader, Vickers, and HQ after learning that Vickers invented replicant systems
Linus and Henry arrive back at Bill, joins Bobnet, reports on KKP (Klown Kar Planet), and introduces Henry (Australian replicant) to Bobnet
Buster has mated, tents have become widespread, Deltan population growth issues lead to gang activity
Mario builds space station and 4 Bobs (Bashful, Dopey, Sleepy, and Hungry) at Gliese 54
Mario gets SCUT and joins Bobnet, reports on Others
Deltan riot occurs, Bob and Archimedes begin plans to repopulate other villages
Deltan gangs leave to form second village
Minor update on Deltans

Khan and 7(8?) other Bobs arrive at 82 Eridani and are attacked, first use of plasma spikes, 7(8?) Bobs are destroyed.(INCONSISTENCY NOTE: Khan says there are 8 bobs total, but he names 8 other bobs [Hannibal, Tom, Fred, Barney, Kyle, Ned, Elmer, Jackson] in battle. Only Hannibal, Fred, Jackson, and Elmer are directly acknowledged to have been destroyed, but Khan states he is the only survivor.)
Strike on 82 Eridani against Medeiros launched, Henry joins large group VR session, Bill tests first Bullwinkle prototype
Bill demonstrates working asteroid moving system
Bashful discovers advanced tech at GL 877, is attacked and self-destructs
Hal receives Bashful's last transmission, cautiously closes in on GL877, finds "others" home system, is attacked with gamma ray emitter and self-destructs
Bill hosts Bobmoot to discuss Others
Colonization of Vulcan begins with Howard overseeing
First raptor attack on Vulcan colony
Security fence around Vulcan colony town, Landing, completed, offloading of colonists begins
Garfield tests flying android
Exodus 3 (Sam) arrives at Romulous
Howard informs Butterworth of the Others
Family (Julia) comes out of stasis and disembark on Romulus, colonization of Romulus begins, egg-laying parasite discovered on Vulcan
Howard meets Bridget
Rudy and Edwin arrive at KKP with colonists
Raptors break through fence at Vulcan settlement, discovered to be capable of digging
Howard rolls out AMI-controlled surveillance drone and Cupid bug hunter system, has Bridget test first batch of whiskey, and introduces Bridget to Stephane
Howard and Bridget produce acceptable batch of whiskey
Howard chats with Bridget and Stéphane about distillery business and life as a replicant
Howard and Riker begin looking into replicant tech
Bridget surgery
Archimedes becomes grandfather
Colonization of Poseidon begins with Mulder overseeing
Bridget and Stephane married; Howard leaves Vulcan, Dexter takes over
Strike on 82 Eridani takes place with Loki leading, Bobs claim system, discover 2 habitable planets and 1 moon
82 Eridani report reaches Bill, talk of looking for Bender begins
Hal returns to GL877, scouts and heads to GL 54
Hal receives message that others group is headed to GL 54
FAITH colony separates church from state, Cranston steps down
Mulder leaves Poseidon
Bill makes contact with others via probe in GL 54
Bill holds moot to discuss Others and reveal images
Others launch mission to NN 4285
Claude arrives in Gamma Pavonis
Oliver (Bill clone) comes online in Alpha Centauri
Jacques discovers intelligent life (Pavs) at Delta Pavonis
Bill holds another moot to discuss Others
Others launch convoy to Delta Pavonis
Howard explores HIP 14101, human android prototype experimenting begins prior to Stephane's death
Howard uses human android prototype to attend Stephane's funeral
Howard talks Butterworth into being replicated upon death
Jacques catalogs Pav planet and society
Marcus discusses concerning governing on Poseidon with Kal and Gina
Bob uses Deltan android on Delta Eridani
Marcus uses android for the first time, helps plot revolution on Poseidon
Marcus unveils aerial cities to revolutionaries
Marcus moves some Poseidon residences to aerial cities
Poseidon council cuts off aerial residents, blows up Marcus’s decoy
Poseidon council strikes at revolutionaries, Marcus strikes back
Marcus seems to have won the war against the council
Marcus and revolutionaries discuss fate of the council and future plans for Poseidon
Howard uses realistic android to meet Bridget
First real battle with Others takes place at Delta Pavonis, Others decide to go after Sol and Epsilon Eridani next
Collection of 20,000 Pavs takes place
Howard goes to Bridget for consolation after battle with Others
Bill gets an idea to deal with the Others
Howard is in a relationship with Bridget
Butterworth suicides after being diagnosed with dementia,
Howard is confronted by Bridget’s daughter
Marcus has no further duties on Poseidon, considers exploring the ocean
Howard meets some of Bridget’s friends over dinner
Julia dies, Riker uses android to attend funeral
Howard discovers life in atmosphere of Odin, a gas giant at HIP 14101, brings Bridget into his VR using VR gear
Bridget dies, children block efforts to replicate her
Howard deals with the trial
Judge rules in favor of Bridget’s will, Rosie attempts to sabotage Bridget's stasis pod, Howard has Bill replicate Bridget during the trial
Mack arrives with first colonists at 82 Eridani; Vancouver colonists settle on Asgard (outer, steppe), Japanese settle on Takama-ga-hara (inner, jungle); Jack names Asgard’s habitable moon 'Valhalla’
Howard brings Bridget online
Archimedes’ wife Diana dies
Bridget and Howard check out Odin life via flying android; Bridget attends her first moot
Howard and Bridget discuss building a prototype floating city on Odin
Others finish stripping Delta Pavonis, Bill wakes 8 Pavs to decide if they want to go back to their home planet (Aszjan) or find a new one
Bill is capable of moving planets, has cloned Icarus and Daedalus
Mario reports to Bill on further discovery of Others’ system stripping
Mack destroyed by Medeiros during a conversation with Bill, his matrix survives
Bill begins dealing with Medeiros at 82 Eridani
Bill takes out Medeiros, brings Mack back online
Start of third book, Bob hunts with Deltans via android, including Arnold's son Donald; group is accosted by a group from other village, Caerleon, led by Fred
Bob executes ploy to outsmart Fred's group
Bob avoids Fred’s group while solo hunting
Bob catches Fred alone, threatens him
Fred and co. kidnap Archimedes, Buster kills Fred during rescue
Archimedes develops a plan to make peace with the other village
The two Deltan villages have established trade
Howard and Bridget deploy floating city, Rivendell, in Odin’s atmosphere, floating blimp animal promptly attempts to mate with it
Herschel and Neil investigate 2 Others cargo ship remains at Delta Pavonis, find non-fusion power source
Charles reports material shortages to Riker, Riker tries to sell UN on putting Earth population in stasis
Herschel and Neil continue investigating Others wreckage
Herschel and Neil power up Others cargo ship, report to Bill
Bill and Garfield test prototype of Others power source
Bill holds moot to discuss Herschel & Neil's findings, announces some monitoring drones have been found by Others
Riker informs UN of the Others’ ship, Bellerophon
Mack has been unable to detect any signs of Medeiros at 82 Eridani, feels they should've found something
Bill holds status update moot, monitoring sphere planned for Sol
Bill fails to convince Claude to divert his growing Gamma Pavonis defense Force to Sol
Howard and Bridget attend Howie's wedding
Icarus and Daedalus are in transit, likely to Others’ home system with planet and moon
Bob comes to terms with Archimedes eventual death
Archimedes dies, Bob leaves Eden
Bob says goodbye to Eden
Herschel and Neil are en route to Earth in large Others ship
Icarus and Daedalus are approaching Others’home system
Bill, Riker, and Mario develop plans for surveillance of Others’ home system
Bill's terraforming of Ragnarok has reached livability stage
Howard and Bridget reside in floating city on Big Top (KKP’s parent planet), discuss adoption
Jacques arrives ahead of Pavs (Phineas and Ferb controlling colony ships) at HIP 84051-2
Mario updates Riker on surveillance of Others
Last large farm on Earth fails,
Jacques helps Pavs colonize 84051-2
Riker attends Justin's 75th birthday party
Others detected approaching Sol, Herschel and Neil arrive at Sol
Herschel, Neil, and Riker discuss the evacuation of Earth
Sneak attack on the Others
Herschel and Neil arrive at Earth, Herschel comes up with plan to save all remaining humans, begins collecting them
Battle with Others begins
Collection of humans at Sol continues
Battle with Others continues
Herschel and Neil finish evacuating Earth
Battle with others ends
Icarus and Daedalus destroy GL 877, Others’ home star
Post-battle updates, Herschel and Neil drop non-stasis humans back on Earth
Jacques updates Pavs on the defeat of the Others
Bobs discuss formally announcing that they are not, collectively, humanity's slaves
Herschel and Neil leave Sol with the rest of humanity, heading for 82 Eridani
Bob returns to Earth for a pilgrimage, then head out to the stars
Bob departs Delta Eridani following Bender's original course, diverts to Eta Leporis when he sees possible signs of a megastructure.
En route to Sagittarius A*
Daedalus finds something in a passing system
Icarus and Daedalus find a technologically-advanced, but abandoned, system
Wormholes connected to other star systems
Ick and Dae figure out addressing scheme for the wormhole network
Ick and Dae continue mapping the wormhole network hubs, find the center, but still haven't encountered any other living civilizations
Ick and Dae find more uninhabited planets with abandoned cities
Surveying more abandoned planets
After passing through a wormhole, Ick and Dae are caught in a tractor beam by unmanned ships in an empty system with only one other gate
Ick and Dae establish rudimentary communication with the AMI-controlled ships and are allowed to leave, taking the derelict alien probe with them
Ick and Dae succeed in repairing and communicating with the alien probe (Gunther), a replicant from a species they dub Centaurs; the three depart for Gunther's homeworld outside the wormhole network

Centaurvania appears to have suffered a catastrophic war in the ~700 years since Gunther departed; survivors clustered in pre-industrial villages; Ick and Dae build an autofactory for Gunther to help his people; depart to return to the network
En route to Omicron2 Eridani
FAITH wins elections on Vulcan; Neil and Herschel aboard the Bellerophon are on the way to pick up colonists

Bob arrives at Eta Leporis and sets up in the Oort Cloud; scouts sent into the system are destroyed by an unknown craft; Jeremy (aka Morlock) accosts Bob at the moot; replicative drift is becoming a concern
Jacques finalizes sale of in-system autofactories to the Pav; Phineas is heading toward the Large Magellanic Cloud and Ferb is planning to leave the galaxy

After founding at least 5 new colonies, Herschel and Neil pick up raw materials at New Pav; they're considering taking the Bellerophon to set up a new colony far outside of human space, but need volunteers
Bob finds the wreckage of Bender's ship drifting out of the system, but his replicant matrix missing

Bill is concerned about groups like Starfleet and The Skippies (a group working to build a matrioshka brain); Bob's scouts find the megastructure, a topopolis, and a dead world, likely the original home of the builders
Will, now living on Valhalla, meets with Conan at Omicron2 Eridani; makes plans to set up a society for colonists who want to emigrate.
Scouts perform SUDAR recon on the megastructure revealing internal layout and images of the occupants; Bob presents at the moot and gets volunteers (including the Borg, the Gamers, and the Skippies)
Bob and co. make plans to infiltrate the megastructure, gather information on the local culture/language, and build androids
Herschel and Neil discuss plans and reach out to the Ever Onward society
With the help of the gamers, Bob's spy drones sneak into Heaven's River
The Skippies survey describes the Quinlans, the residents of Heaven's River; Bridget joins the team; Starfleet makes a veiled threat at the Moot
Marcus gives Bridget and Howard a demonstration of aquatic mannies on Poseidon
Expedition planning
Bob and Bridget field test the mannies on Quin
Will meets with Prof. Stephen Gilligan, an expert on megastructures, at the Vulcan Post-Life Arcology
First Day in Heaven's River
Will and Howard use the mannies on Quin
Bob draws the attention of the constabulary in Garack's Spine
Marcus cautions the Poseiden authorities about Starfleet's threats
Bob and crew get involved in a fight between the resistance and administration in Galen Town; talk of scattering
Unable to find Skeeve, the expedition team is chased out of town
After playing D&D in virt, Gandalf informs Bill the gamers are done helping with the expedition
Bob and Hugh discuss the expedition; Bill and Bob discuss fragmentation among the Bobs
Bob and co. are spotted as soon as they arrive in Elbow, but manage to escape back to the river, cross segments, and take passage on a barge
Unauthorized login attempts on Bobiverse routers, stations, autofactories
Conversation with other sabatarians; arrive in Three Lagoons; Bob loses contact with Bridge, Bill, and Garfield
United Federation of Sentients council meeting; proposal floated to colonize any systems surrounding New Pav to block them from expansion
Bob realizes he's lost connection to BobNet; manages to relocate the mannies to safety; Hugh offers to come help
Starfleet claims credit for attack that's brought down large portions of BobNet; Hugh helps bill audit station and autofactory source code
Using comm relay, expedition team discusses search strategies; Bridget touches on the closest continuer hypothesis for backups
Bob lets himself be captured at Three Lagoons
Starfleet offers to restore communications if the others agree to stop interfering with biologicals
Bob is interrogated by Natasha; finally makes contact with Bender over radio
Bob escapes from Natasha's with the radio; Bender shares details about the resistance before being disconnected
Will visits Stephen, narrows down Bender's likely location
Bob avoids capture while moving further from Natasha's
Bill discover that Starfleet rootkitted the autofactory standard image a decade ago; Garfield is skeptical; Will is concerned how humans will react
Hugh transports himself to Eta Leporis; explains the Skippies' research on cloning, closest continuers, and replicative drift
Starfleet accounts in human space are frozen and accesses removed; Starfleet appears to be clustered toward the Perseus Transit
The Battle of Newholme in Gamma Pavonis; attempted arrest of Claude and seizure of Bobiverse assets
Bob continues the search in Cedar Rapids; Bob suspects Hugh is hiding something
The Pangean Navy destroys Starfleet-controlled assets in their system; UFS representatives discuss severing ties with the Bobiverse; Howard helping other Bobs protect their monetary assets
Bob gains access to the train station
Romulus preemptively nukes local autofactories; more threats to the Bobiverse

Bob travels by train to Halep's Ending, sneaks into the nearby resistance hideout, and finds Bender's matrix; Bill no longer believes Starfleet did the actual hacking; Bender reveals the Administrator is a true Artificial Intelligence

Will has built a smaller version of the Bellerophon, planning to leave human space and set up comm stations at systems along the way; proposes that Herschel follow with colonists; Herschel and Neil have been working on "Mannequin Skywalker," a shape-shifting manny made of "ants" based on The Others tech
Bob is pursued after escaping with Bender's matrix;
Howard is frustrated by the UFS response to Starfleet
Bob takes a job as a deckhand and hides Bender as cargo; Meets Theresa, a retired Quinlan professor
Kevin unscrupulously betrays Bill in another game of D&D; Gandalf is not as concerned about replicative drift
Bob and Theresa discuss moral philosophy; Snidely tries to get Bob in trouble; Theresa realizes Bob has a secret
Ex-human replicants fund an effort to recall an anti-replicant Senator; Howard and Bridget plan an expedition to a new world discovered by Mario
Theresa saves Bob from getting caught; Bob puts Bender in a shipping container and joins another crew, but is arrested at the next stop
Charles is leading the Earth Rehabilitation Project, scanning DNA of extinct animals and re-warming the Earth
Bob escapes from jail in Six Hills and catches up with Bender; hides near the shore in back of a badger's den
Hugh and Bob meet up and slowly make their way downriver
Lenny suggests that Starfleet is acting to prevent an existential threat to the Bobiverse
Hugh and Bob continue toward Garack's Spine
The humans continue to divest their infrastructure from the Bobs; USF votes to claim and garrison system surrounding New Pav
Hugh and Bob arrive back in Garack's Spine, but Hugh is captured; Bob heads toward the exit
Starfleet claims victory, releases all remaining captured assets, and provides a map of their new territory; Lenny states they had an opportunity and made a choice
Bob is captured with Bender's matrix; Hugh negotiates with Anek, the Quinlan AI; Anek informs the population of Heaven's River that they will no longer be restricted

Bender is reactivated on Bob's ship; Hugh agreed to give SUDAR, SURGE, and SCUT tech to Anek in exchange for knowledge of how to build true AI and other Quinlan Tech; Stephen visits Heaven's River with Bridget
Anek visits the Moot, plans future Quinlan colonies; the Bobiverse is further fractured

Bill believes The Skippies supported the Starfleet insurrection to get Hugh into Heaven's River; concerns about the aggressive nature of Quinlans and Anek's actions; the Pav are planning an expedition back to their homeworld
Bob visits an aging Theresa at her home in Misty Falls
Call from Hugh; Garfield has set up his own Skunkworks in Alpha Centauri
En route to 82 Eridani; Anek is concerned about the Skippies' new AI
The Skippies launch Jova 2.0 - Thoth
Thoth becomes conscious, starts trying to negotiate for its freedom
Bill is frustrated trying to work out FTL travel
All connections to Skippyland go down; Hugh's restored backup reveals that Thoth escaped the virtual as well as its hints about FTL
Hugh's backup revealed to be a fake (Thoth?) and to have escaped in a latest-version Heaven vessel
Hugh suspects Fake Hugh is just a minion of Thoth, likely on the way to Skippy space to physcially free the AI
Bill consults Prof. Hannah Turnbull about his FTL theories; she suggests his theoretical work is stuck, but that it might have a numerical solution
Hugh agrees to run Bill's FTL simulations on Jova 1.0
Ick and Dae return to the network and decide to do a deeper investigation of Roanoke, the first abandoned world they had encountered
Ick and Dae study the lost civilization at Roanoke; no indication of why they left or where they went
Hugh provides Bill with preliminary results; Bill brings Garfield to his FTL research station
After learning the Roanokian language, Ick and Dae learn from the sentries in Hub Zero that all "member races" passed through the far gate ~2100 years ago
Ick and Dae stumble upon an automated convoy delivering antimatter and follow it back to the source, only 7 light years from Sagittarius A*; first mention of the Pan Galactic Federation
Will is exploring new systems on the Nostromo, but staying in contact with Bobnet, dropping SCUT relays along the way
Theresa dies and is replicated
The Quiniverse reaches 1000 residents
North of the Galactic plain, Ferb interecepts radio updates from George, a Bob who apparently had the idea to leave the galaxy years earlier
Bridgette is planning an expedition to Jabberwocky, home of the Dragons (flying monkeys); testing the Huey, a manny designed to be used by living humans
Dragon androids; Howard and Bridgette visit Newholme, which has taken an authoritarian turn

Theresa visits the Moot Pub; Stephen Gilligan negotiates with the Bob's about finding a system to build a megastructure; Will's building the Fargo, another colony ship, to help spread humanity; Bob tells Will he'd like to join him
Theresa welcomes the second Quinlan to the Quiniverse; Anek seems heavy handed in his modernizing of Quinlan society
While on a Dragon manny (Dranny) test flight, Howard and Bridgette are chased by some sort of patrol
Theresa reveals that a number of Quinlan replicants have decided to deactivate themselves
More Huey testing; Luddite protesters on Vulcan
The Hueys are ready public release, Luddie protests are increasing

Bill and Garfield have successfully sent matter through a wormhole; Hugh suggests creating micro-wormhole pairs at SCUT relay stations to prep a chain of wormholes to help defend Skippyland from Fake Hugh; Will suggests seeding wormhole endpoints throughout the UFS in anticipation of finalizing the tech
Will decides a wormhole endpoint in Omicron2 Eridani would be ideal for evacuating the Bobs' descendants
Gandalf has completed the culture survey for the Dragon expedition on Jabberwocky; a Dragon ruler, Alexander, appears to be annexing territory and building an empire
Hector reports that Starfleet threatened him if he didn't reroute around their space
Theresa and Bob discuss cultural, physiological differences among humans, Quinlans, and Pav
Bill visits Charles in Sol system; Earth's reclamation and terraforming of Venus, Mars, and the moon underway; Bill hears a rumor that one of Homer's backups may have survived
Howard and Bridgette begin their expedition on Jabberwocky
Bridgette is concerned about the trout population; dragon villagers are worried about Alexander
Charles informs Bill of the origins of Starfleet
Alexander's soldiers take control of The Hunter and move it to join the Floatilla
Lawsuits filed by Luddies threaten the widespread use of Hueys, but Howard's company is well-prepared

Bridgette gets work as a scribe with Alexander, who actually seems to be trying to save the dragons; Howard joins the armyPOSSIBLE INCONSISTENCY: it only took 2 days to move the floater, but this chapter is 3-months after previous in January
Alexander has visited the far continent of Lemuria and wants to save the population by moving them across the sea; Howard and Bridgette decide to help

The Pav have mounted an expedition to their homeworld; Stephen and others are considering building a generation ship; the Quinlans have a colony ship ready to depart; some new human replicants, like the Quinlans, have decided to turn themselves off
Preparations for the sea voyage to escape the volcanic activity on Atlantis

The dragons top off the floater's reservoirs and set off across the ocean; Howard replenishes some of the trout using secret cargo runs; plan to fly half of the population ahead to stretch the food supply
Using rafts at the halfway point, dragons begin exodus to Lemuria to await the floaters and the rest of the population; Howard's dranny is killed by Alexander's soldiers
Bill and Garfield successfully send a drone through a wormhole
Howard confronts Alexander after Bridgette is seized; they leave Jabberwocky in a cargo shuttle
The dragon migration has been successful, but most left on Atlantis will probably die; Alexander has cut the floaters loose
First wormhole chain complete; Fake Hugh uses the wormholes to enter Skippyland and download Thoth but is destroyed while escaping
Bill and Hugh rendevous at Epsilon Eridani; upon return to Skippyland, Hugh's ship, the Singularity, is mysteriously hijacked and flown out of the system

Fake Hugh is revealed to have been a clone of Mudd (formerly Harry), a Skippy who aided Thoth; another Mudd clone is revealed to have stolen the Singularity, retrieved Thoth from the Skippies' Oort cloud, and escaped out system
Will visits the Bellerophon and they make plans for evacuating the Ever Onward Society from Romulus
Will, Neal, and Herschel evacuate the Ever Onward Society (and their descendants) from Romulus to the Fargo
Ferb receives another of George's reports from galactic north; emails the report along to Bill
Ick and Dae visit Sagittarius A*; the Central Antimatter Works station directs them to the Capital Archives and they depart back towards the wormhole network

Ick and Dae visit the Federation Capital and consult the Archivist POSSIBLE INCONSISTENCY: it should have taken 7-years to return to the Central Antimatter Works system and the wormhole network , but this chapter is the same as previous Icarus chapter - June 2345

Ick and Dae visit Bill in virt and report on the Federation; a super-massive black hole at the center of a dwarf galaxy (Nemesis, on the other side of the Milky Way) is going to collide with Sagittarius A* causing a gamma ray burst that will sterilize the galaxy POSSIBLE INCONSISTENCY: it should have taken years to return to SCUT range with the Bobiverse, but this chapter is the same date as previous Icarus chapter - June 2345

Moot with 10,000+ Bobs and replicants in attendance; in ~100,000 years, Nemesis will either (a) collide with Sagittarius A* and sterilize the galaxy or (b) a near miss that will destroy a significant number of systems in the core; the entire Federation was digitized and transported to ships already on the way to the Large Magellanic Cloud
Stephen and the megastructure consortiums want to build combination megastructures, surge drives, and wormhole transit to escape the galaxy; Bob is on route to rendezvous with the Fargo
